home.title: Share your project once
home.text: Instead of calling several companies one by one, you can describe the job once and help the right local professionals understand it faster.

home.title: Clear expectations before you submit
home.text: You can see what happens next, why details are helpful, and how your contact preferences work before sharing personal information.

home.title: Focused on Tampa Bay
home.text: We focus on local professionals serving Riverview and the greater Tampa Bay area so the experience feels more relevant and less generic.

service-kitchen-remodeling.title: Built for larger projects without feeling chaotic
service-kitchen-remodeling.text: Kitchen remodeling requests need more detail than simple service calls, so the flow is structured to gather scope, planning stage, and timeline in guided steps.

service-kitchen-remodeling.title: Explain the project once
service-kitchen-remodeling.text: Instead of repeating the same project details to multiple companies, users can submit one organized request that gives local professionals a clearer starting point.

service-kitchen-remodeling.title: You stay in control
service-kitchen-remodeling.text: You choose your preferred contact method and the request is meant for relevant local professionals, not a broad spam blast.

kitchen: Your request is intended only for relevant local professionals for this project.
Detailed submissions help reduce repetitive follow-up calls and basic clarification texts.
Photos help when available, but they are always optional and never required to submit.
cleaning: This shorter flow is designed for faster service requests without turning into a generic lead form.
You can keep the request simple while still giving providers enough context to respond usefully.
You choose how local professionals contact you and stay in control of the request.
standard: Your request is only meant to help relevant local professionals understand the basics before contacting you.
You stay in control of how and when professionals follow up.
A few useful details now can reduce repetitive back-and-forth later.
